languages.text: "Ты не потерян, наоборот — ты ступил на новый путь. Ты готов был сгинуть, но Бог-Император сказал, что ты должен жить. Так живи и веди за собой верующих!"
"You are not lost, on the contrary — you have set foot on a new path. You were ready to die, but the God-Emperor said you must live. So live and lead the faithful!"
languages.original_text: "Ты не потерян, наоборот — ты ступил на новый путь. Ты готов был сгинуть, но Бог-Император сказал, что ты должен жить. Так живи и веди за собой верующих!"

traits.locale_text: "You are not lost, on the contrary — you have set foot on a new path. You were ready to die, but the God-Emperor said you must live. So live and lead the faithful!"
"You are not lost, on the contrary — you have set foot on a new path. You were ready to die, but the God-Emperor said you must live. So live and lead the faithful!"
"You are not lost, on the contrary — you have set foot on a new path. You were ready to die, but the God-Emperor said you must live. So live and lead the faithful!"

languages.text: 「あなたは迷子ではない、むしろ、あなたは新たな道に足を踏み入れた。あなたは死の準備をしていたが、神帝はあなたが生きなければならないと言った。生き、信者たちを導け！」
languages.original_text: "You are not lost, on the contrary — you have set foot on a new path. You were ready to die, but the God-Emperor said you must live. So live and lead the faithful!"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは迷子ではない、むしろ、あなたは新たな道に足を踏み入れた。あなたは死の準備をしていたが、神帝はあなたが生きなければならないと言った。生き、信者たちを導け！」

languages.text: “你没有迷失，恰恰相反，你踏上了一条新的道路。你准备赴死，但神皇说你必须活着。所以活下去，去引领信众吧！”
languages.original_text: "You are not lost, on the contrary — you have set foot on a new path. You were ready to die, but the God-Emperor said you must live. So live and lead the faithful!"

traits.locale_text: “你没有迷失，恰恰相反，你踏上了一条新的道路。你准备赴死，但神皇说你必须活着。所以活下去，去引领信众吧！”

languages.text: « Vous n'êtes pas perdu. Au contraire, vous vous êtes engagé sur une nouvelle voie. Vous étiez prêt à mourir, mais l'Empereur-Dieu a décidé que vous deviez vivre. Alors, vivez et menez les fidèles ! »
languages.original_text: "You are not lost, on the contrary — you have set foot on a new path. You were ready to die, but the God-Emperor said you must live. So live and lead the faithful!"

traits.locale_text: « Vous n'êtes pas perdu. Au contraire, vous vous êtes engagé sur une nouvelle voie. Vous étiez prêt à mourir, mais l'Empereur-Dieu a décidé que vous deviez vivre. Alors, vivez et menez les fidèles ! »

languages.text: «No está perdido; al contrario: está trazando un nuevo camino. Estaba listo para morir, pero el Dios Emperador ha determinado que debe vivir. ¡Viva, pues, y guíe a los fieles!».
languages.original_text: "You are not lost, on the contrary — you have set foot on a new path. You were ready to die, but the God-Emperor said you must live. So live and lead the faithful!"

traits.locale_text: «No está perdido; al contrario: está trazando un nuevo camino. Estaba listo para morir, pero el Dios Emperador ha determinado que debe vivir. ¡Viva, pues, y guíe a los fieles!».

languages.text: "Kaybolmadın, tam aksine... Yeni bir yola ayak bastın. Ölmeye hazırdın ama Tanrı İmparator, yaşaman gerektiğini söyledi. Öyleyse yaşa ve inananlara liderlik et!"
languages.original_text: "You are not lost, on the contrary — you have set foot on a new path. You were ready to die, but the God-Emperor said you must live. So live and lead the faithful!"

traits.locale_text: "Kaybolmadın, tam aksine... Yeni bir yola ayak bastın. Ölmeye hazırdın ama Tanrı İmparator, yaşaman gerektiğini söyledi. Öyleyse yaşa ve inananlara liderlik et!"

languages.text: "Ihr seid nicht verloren. Im Gegenteil ... Ihr habt einen neuen Weg eingeschlagen. Ihr wart bereit, zu sterben, aber der Gottimperator sagte, Ihr müsst leben. Also lebt und führt die Gläubigen an!"
languages.original_text: "You are not lost, on the contrary — you have set foot on a new path. You were ready to die, but the God-Emperor said you must live. So live and lead the faithful!"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid nicht verloren. Im Gegenteil ... Ihr habt einen neuen Weg eingeschlagen. Ihr wart bereit, zu sterben, aber der Gottimperator sagte, Ihr müsst leben. Also lebt und führt die Gläubigen an!"
